mapper.select:
SELECT ID, MENU_NAME, PARENT_ID, ORDER_NUM, PATH, COMPONENT, QUERY, IS_FRAME, LINK, IS_CACHE, MENU_TYPE, VISIBLE, STATUS, PERMS, ICON, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, REMARK, MENU_ICON_COLOR, DATA_TYPE FROM SYS_MENU
ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu( ID, MENU_NAME, PARENT_ID, ORDER_NUM, PATH, COMPONENT, QUERY, IS_FRAME, IS_CACHE, MENU_TYPE, VISIBLE, STATUS, PERMS, ICON, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, REMARK, MENU_ICON_COLOR, DATA_TYPE, LINK )VALUES ( #{id}, #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNum, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{component, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isFrame, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isCache, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{menuType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visible, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{perms, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuIconColor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE SYS_MENU SET MENU_NAME = #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum, jdbcType=BIGINT}, PATH = #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPONENT = #{component, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUERY = #{query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_FRAME = #{isFrame, jdbcType=BIGINT}, IS_CACHE = #{isCache, jdbcType=BIGINT}, MENU_TYPE = #{menuType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VISIBLE = #{visible, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PERMS = #{perms, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ICON = #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_ICON_COLOR = #{menuIconColor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATA_TYPE = #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LINK = #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.id as menu_id, A.id, A.menu_name, A.parent_id, A.order_num, A.path, A.component, A.query, A.is_frame, A.is_cache, A.menu_type, A.visible, A.status, A.data_type, A.MENU_ICON_COLOR as menuIconColor, DECODE( A.status, '1', '正常', '停用') as statusLabel, nvl(perms,'') as perms, A.icon, A.create_time, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(B.ID) FROM SYS_MENU B WHERE B.PARENT_ID = A.ID) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS has_children, A.LINK
FROM SYS_MENU A WHERE 1 = 1
FROM SYS_MENU A, SYS_ROLE_MENU B, SYS_ROLE_USER C where C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID AND B.MENU_ID = A.ID
AND A.menu_name LIKE #{menuNameLike,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.PARENT_ID = 0
AND A.status = #{status}
order by parent_id, order_num

SELECT A.id as menu_id, A.menu_name, A.parent_id, A.order_num, A.path, A.component, A.query, A.is_frame, A.is_cache, A.menu_type, A.visible, A.status, A.data_type, A.icon_app, A.APP_TYPE, DECODE( A.status, '1', '正常', '停用') as statusLabel, nvl(perms,'') as perms, A.icon, A.create_time, A.LINK FROM SYS_MENU A, SYS_ROLE_MENU B, SYS_ROLE_USER C where C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID AND B.MENU_ID = A.ID AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'APP' AND A.status = 0 order by parent_id, order_num

SELECT A.id as menu_id, A.menu_name, A.parent_id, A.order_num, A.path, A.component, A.query, A.is_frame, A.is_cache, A.menu_type, A.visible, A.status, A.data_type, A.icon_app, DECODE( A.status, '1', '正常', '停用') as statusLabel, nvl(perms,'') as perms, A.icon, A.create_time FROM SYS_MENU A, SYS_ROLE_MENU B, SYS_ROLE_USER C where C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID AND B.MENU_ID = A.ID AND A.DATA_TYPE = 'APPLET' AND A.status = 0 order by parent_id, order_num
select A.ID, A.MENU_NAME as label, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(B1.ID) FROM SYS_MENU B1 WHERE B1.PARENT_ID = A.ID) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isAlwaysShow from SYS_MENU A WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId}

SELECT A.ID, A.ID as menuId, A.MENU_NAME, A.PARENT_ID, A.ORDER_NUM, A.PATH, A.COMPONENT, A.QUERY, A.IS_FRAME, A.LINK, A.IS_CACHE, A.MENU_TYPE, A.VISIBLE, A.STATUS, A.PERMS, A.ICON, A.CREATE_BY, A.create_by_name, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPDATE_BY, A.update_BY_NAME, A.UPDATE_TIME, A.REMARK, A.MENU_ICON_COLOR, A.DATA_TYPE, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(B.ID) FROM SYS_MENU B WHERE B.PARENT_ID = A.ID) > 0 THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS has_children, DECODE(A.STATUS, '1', '在用', '停用') STATUS_LABEL, DECODE(A.MENU_TYPE, 'C', '菜单', 'M', '目录', '按钮') MENU_TYPE_LABEL
FROM SYS_MENU A WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentGid}
FROM SYS_MENU A, SYS_ROLE_MENU B, SYS_ROLE_USER C where AND PARENT_ID = #{parentGid} C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID AND B.MENU_ID = A.ID
ORDER BY A.ORDER_NUM

select A.ID, A.ID as menuId, A.MENU_NAME, A.PARENT_ID, A.ORDER_NUM, A.PATH, A.COMPONENT, A.QUERY, A.IS_FRAME, A.LINK, A.IS_CACHE, A.MENU_TYPE, A.VISIBLE, A.STATUS, A.PERMS, A.ICON, A.CREATE_BY, A.create_by_name, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPDATE_BY, A.update_BY_NAME, A.UPDATE_TIME, A.REMARK, A.MENU_ICON_COLOR, A.DATA_TYPE from SYS_MENU A where A.MENU_TYPE in ('C','M')
SELECT PERMS FROM SYS_MENU WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND MENU_TYPE = 'F'
